title: Master ERROR Table Record
description: Schema for the master ERROR table — the system's immutable fault registry. Classified as EVENT. INSERT-only. Never UPDATE or DELETE. Per PSB-CONST-001 Parts IV, XVI, and XX.

error_id.description: Unique identifier for this fault record.

error_code.description: Structured error code identifying the fault type. Format: {CATEGORY}_{SPECIFIC} (e.g., IMO_VIOLATION, CTB_PLACEMENT_INVALID, HEIR_INCOMPLETE).

subhub_origin.description: The sub-hub that produced or detected this fault.

orbt_mode.description: ORBT mode active at the time of fault.

doctrine_version.description: Doctrine version in effect when the fault occurred.

severity.description: Fault severity. CRITICAL and HIGH require CAPA records.

artifact_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the artifact that triggered the fault, if applicable. Null if no artifact involved.

pid.description: Process Instance Document ID of the session that produced this fault. Format: AI-{HUB_ID}-{TIMESTAMP}-{RANDOM}.

rule_id.description: The audit rule ID (RULE-xxx or AUD-xxx) that was violated, if applicable.
